title: justicia novogaliciana
intro: Justicia novogaliciana, also known as Mexican honeysuckle or Justicia, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. Herbal preparations of Justicia novogaliciana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal benefits.
